arts.ttl: West Brom march to Championship summit after Pompey win
arts.sum: Alex Mowatt's brace, after Josh Maja became the Championship's leading goalscorer, sent West Brom top of the table with a clinical 3-0 victory over winless Portsmouth.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth 0 West Brom 3: Neil Allen's verdict - Blues suffer harsh lessons after failing to capitalise
arts.sum: Following a maiden Championship defeat of the season to Sunderland, John Mousinho spoke of learning lessons.

arts.ttl: ‘Won’t be bettered’, ‘potentially lethal’, ‘short of confidence’: Jordan Cross’ Portsmouth ratings against West Brom
arts.sum: The ratings are in from Pompey’s clash with West Brom.

arts.ttl: West Brom march to Championship summit with 3-0 win over Portsmouth
arts.sum: Alex Mowatt scored twice after Josh Maja’s opener.

arts.ttl: Duo's long-awaited injury returns boost Portsmouth line-up for visit of West Brom
arts.sum: Tom McIntyre returns to boost Pompey for the visit of West Brom.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth v West Brom: build-up, team news and live coverage of Championship clash from Fratton Park
West Brom looking to beat Barnsley in teenage winger pursuit
arts.sum: West Brom are looking to sign former Southend United winger Piers Hatcliff ahead of Barnsley, according to reporter… The post West Brom looking to beat Barnsley in teenage winger pursuit appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth v West Brom injury news as four and one doubt
arts.sum: Portsmouth host West Brom at Fratton Park in front of the Sky Sports television cameras in their first EFL Championship game back after the international break.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth fan Mason Mount 'gutted' he missed out on keeping Southampton bottom of Premier League table after Manchester United record 3-0 St Mary's win
arts.sum: Pompey fan Mason Mount has admitted he was ‘gutted’ to miss out on Manchester United’s victory over Southampton at St Mary’s.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth sent early Championship relegation challenge after late Sheffield Wednesday and Plymouth drama
arts.sum: The majority of Pompey’s Championship rivals were in action on Saturday with John Mousinho’s men hosting West Brom on Sunday.
